result.summary: The page is mostly usable, but several elements appear clipped or obscured, especially around horizontally scrolling sections and the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: Several horizontal sections are clipped on the right edge. The top category tab shows only part of “Hot Games,” and the rightmost game cards are cut off in multiple rows.
issues.suggestion: Confirm these areas are intended to be horizontal carousels. If so, add clearer scroll affordance or spacing; if not, adjust the responsive grid/container width to prevent overflow and clipping.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game content near the bottom of the screen, partially covering the last visible row of game tiles.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the page content so scrollable content is not hidden behind the fixed footer.

issues.description: The hero carousel navigation arrows sit very close to the screen edges, with the right arrow appearing partially clipped.
issues.suggestion: Move carousel arrows inward or ensure they have enough horizontal padding within the banner container.

issues.description: Some game cards and category chips appear tightly cropped with little breathing room, making the layout feel crowded on the right side.
issues.suggestion: Increase horizontal padding or adjust card sizing/gaps for a cleaner responsive layout.
